verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Mighty One I thank You for Your goodness Undying love that saved me from the darkness You have chosen me, You have chosen me

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: With Your Spirit, I will carry on To spread Your love to each and everyone You have chosen me, you have chosen me

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: Heighten my hearts desires to serve You Lord To use me as a vessel of Your selfless love Awaken Your spirit in me; fill me with Your grace To bear a love like Yours To bring people back to Your embrace
